layman_headline: Fear grips the crypto market — no clean swing trade setups warrant risking capital right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is in a 'Fear' state with Bitcoin dominance high at 56.5%, which means altcoins are underperforming. Every candidate on the watchlist has bearish chart structure — prices are below key moving averages and momentum is weak. While some coins like BONK look oversold, they're in freefall with no sign of a bottom. The best approach right now is patience: wait for a clearer reversal signal before putting money to work.
layman_action: Stay on the sidelines with cash ready. Watch for Ethereum to pull back to the $1,800 support level — if it holds and bounces with increasing volume, that could be the entry point. Don't chase anything in this fearful, directionless market.
expert_reasoning: No candidate offers a compelling risk/reward setup this cycle. BONK's RSI near 31 is tempting but Three Black Crows and -30% weekly drop signal capitulation without a floor — catching a falling knife. LDO has the best chart bias (+0.85 with Three White Soldiers) but RSI is already 59 and the 7-day move of +15.7% means the easy money has been made with a poor 0.38x R/R to resistance. ETH is the cleanest watch — RSI 39 (our highest-conviction signal type at 80% win rate), strong 5-day momentum reversal, and support at $1,800 is only 2.2% below. However, price is still below all MAs with a -0.70 chart bias. I need to see either a confirmed bounce off $1,800 with volume or a break above $1,900 resistance before committing capital. The BTC options market positioning for $72K is encouraging for the broader market, but weekend geopolitical risk around oil supply (CryptoSlate) adds uncertainty.
risk_factors: Geopolitical risk: 20% of global oil supply in balance could trigger risk-off selloff across all assets
BTC dominance at 56.5% and rising means altcoins could continue bleeding even if BTC holds
Fear & Greed flat at 25-28 for a week — no catalyst to shift sentiment yet
watch_list: ETH price action at $1,800 support — a bounce with volume spike would trigger a BUY next cycle
BTC response to $65K resistance — breaking through could lift the entire market
Fear & Greed index — a move above 35 would signal sentiment turning and validate alt entries
market_context: Crypto is in a fearful, BTC-dominant environment with alts bleeding. Smart money is positioning bullishly in BTC options, but spot markets haven't confirmed the move yet — a dangerous weekend with geopolitical tension overhead.
context_banner: All swing candidates show bearish chart structure in a fearful market — disciplined traders wait for confirmed reversals rather than catching falling knives.

key_signals.description: ETH RSI at 39 is the most actionable oversold reading among candidates — our highest-conviction signal (80% win rate) — but needs price confirmation at $1,800 support.
Fear & Greed at 28 with flat trend for a week suggests no sentiment catalyst yet; historically contrarian bullish but timing is uncertain.
Massive BTC call spreads targeting $72K by month-end ahead of Fed meeting suggest institutional bullish positioning — positive for broader market if it plays out.
Bitcoin trading through dangerous weekend with 20% of world oil supply at risk — geopolitical headwind that could trigger sharp risk-off moves.
Every candidate except LDO shows bearish chart bias; LDO's Three White Soldiers is bullish but R/R ratio of 0.38x to resistance makes it a poor entry point.
